reasoning: Query asks for cherry blossom spots in Tohoku. Tool was scoped to Akita only, missing 弘前公園(Aomori), 三春滝桜(Fukushima), 北上展勝地(Iwate). 角館 (in Akita) is also absent from the visible top results despite being a famous sakura site. missing_entities: 角館, 弘前公園, 北上展勝地, 三春滝桜

reasoning: Kansai sakura (Nara). 吉野山 returned first with sakura_meisho_100 kind, prominence 1, heritage_designations populated — perfect. Other Nara temples follow. 醍醐寺 (Kyoto) and 嵐山 not present (out of prefecture scope), 哲学の道 also Kyoto. Within Nara scope, top selection is excellent.
